details.pattern: Wave 1 fan-out: cartographer-A (no-native-tools), cartographer-B (matched-tools-parity), cartographer-C (agent-profiles), cartographer-D (ts2307-errors), cartographer-E (ts7006-analysis), cartographer-F (misc-errors)
details.note: Mission: fix 358 TS errors across 5 clusters

details.pattern: Cartographer-A: 13 no-native-equivalent tools mapped (3 high complexity, 4 med, 6 low). Cartographer-B: 22 matched pairs with 5 BREAKING gaps, 3 major, 3 minor. Verified handoffs accepted.
TS7006: 186 errors across 28 files. Root cause: db() helper type collapse. 50% DB callbacks, 50% Effect.forEach + test mocks. 75% in test files.
4 blocking conditions: error handling, test strategy, write order, parameter diff. Registry registration should be additive fragments.
95 agent profiles: 47 in DEFAULT_AGENTS, 48 not listed but loadable. 61 lack description. 94 hidden. 3 override built-ins. All usable.
TS2307: ALL from deleted src/cli/cmd/. 60 test + 6 production files. Tool conversion plan: 5 phases, 5 BREAKING fixes, 3 JSON→JSONL, 13 new tools.

target: cartographer-F handoff received — all 6 cartographers complete

details.pattern: 51 misc errors: 25 TS2554 (mockResolvedValue(undefined)), 10 TS2339, 5 TS2322, 5 TS18046, 6 misc. All 358 errors across 6 clusters now fully mapped.
mockResolvedValue() → mockResolvedValue(undefined) in 7 test files. 25 errors resolved.

target: TS2307 Track B — 115 test file import removals

details.pattern: 54 test files fixed, 115 broken imports removed, 115 TS2307 errors resolved. All dirty files preserved (additive only).

wrap() in tool.ts is ideal injection point. ScopedCache has inflight dedup. ~6 cacheable tools (read_source, grep, glob, read). ExecuteResult is JSON-serializable. Design blocker: wrap() has no cache service access.
